zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hill於1401年9月26日出生在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr35歲，母親Isabella Fichett18歲。他於1422年4月19日與Cecily Stourton在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年10月21日在英國波克夏音享年33歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hill于1401年9月26日出生在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr35岁，母亲Isabella Fichett18岁。他于1422年4月19日与Cecily Stourton在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年10月21日在英国波克夏音享年33岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hill was born on 26 September 1401, in Spaxton, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, was 35 and his mother, Isabella Fichett, was 18. He married Cecily Stourton on 19 April 1422, in Spaxton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 October 1434, in Inkpen, Berkshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Spaxton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hill est né le 26 septembre 1401, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella Fichett, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Stourton le 19 avril 1422, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1434, à Inkpen, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hill am 26. September 1401 in Spaxton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr 35 und seine Mutter Isabella Fichett 18. Er hat am 19. April 1422 in Spaxton, Somerset, England Cecily Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1434 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Inkpen, Berkshire, England und wurde in Spaxton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hill è nato il il 26 settembre 1401 nel Spaxton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Fichett, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Stourton il 19 aprile 1422, nel Spaxton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1434, nel Inkpen, Berkshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Spaxton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hillが1401年9月26日にイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Srは35歳，母Isabella Fichettは18歳であった。1422年4月19日にイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンでCecily Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1434年10月21日にイギリスバークシュアイアインクペンで33歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトスプアクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hill(이)가 1401년 9월 26일 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Fichett(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1422년 4월 19일 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에서 Cecily Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 10월 21일 영국 버크실르 이k펜에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.26 September 1401–21 October 1434: 26 de setembro de 1401–21 de outubro de 1434
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hill nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1401, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Fichett, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Stourton em 19 de abril de 1422, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1434, em Inkpen, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hill родился 26 сентября 1401 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Fichett, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Stourton 19 апреля 1422 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1434 г. в местности инкпен, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.26 September 1401–21 October 1434: 26 de septiembre de 1401–21 de octubre de 1434
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hill nació el 26 de septiembre de 1401, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabella Fichett, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Cecily Stourton el 19 de abril de 1422, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1434, en Inkpen, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
